text:
うーん、困ったよー！
まさかこんなことになるなんて……
あ、貴方！　来てくれたんだね！

実はイベントをやるにしても
完全に人手が足りなくて……

最近、エネミーが多すぎるから
人は貸せないって言われちゃったの！
流石にわたしだけじゃ無理だよ！

ああ、もう少しエネミーが減ったら
イベントの準備がはかどるのになぁ……
お願い、エネミーを倒

Humm. What a pickle! Of all the things
to happen, who would have thought...
Oh, hey! It's you!

Honestly, even if I wanted to hold an event,
there's a real lack of helping hands right now...

Lately there are too many enemies roaming
about, so I was told there was no one to spare
for help! I can't do everything all by myself!

If only someone would reduce the number of
enemies, then I could start my event planning...
Won't you be my someone?
